properties.name: anchor
properties.description: ID of, or HTML elemnent itself, to anchor the Toggletip to. Prefer using the `anchor` slot

properties.name: open
properties.description: Sets the open state of the Toggletip

properties.name: placement
properties.description: Prefered placement of the toggletip in relation to the anchor element

slots.name: default
slots.description: For the default content of the Toggletip.

slots.name: action-items
slots.description: For action buttons inside the Toggletip
